entities.description: As a subsection of '6附图最小系统设计', this section provides the design details of the minimum system, which is part of the hardware manual for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the design methodology of the minimum system, which is discussed in this section.
Refers to the accompanying diagrams or figures that illustrate the minimum system design, as described in this section.

relations.description: The concept of '最小系统设计' (minimum system design) is a primary topic of section 6附图最小系统设计.
The concept of '附图' (appendix diagrams) is a primary topic of section 6附图最小系统设计.
